issue_title: fix(datasets): "Duplicate" button is enabled on initial render with empty name field
summary: Initialize disableSave to true and reset it in useEffect so the Duplicate button is disabled whenever the name field is empty.

issue_title: fix(explore): relative time comparison offsets aggregate the full shifted bucket instead of the equivalent partial period
summary: Fixed relative time comparison offsets to preserve partial-period bounds by using outer_from_dttm/outer_to_dttm as inner bounds instead of the shifted values, with unit tests added.

issue_title: fix(sqllab): databases with expose_in_sqllab=false are shown in the SQL Lab database selector (6.0→6.1 regression)
summary: Added sqlLabFilter prop to DatabaseSelector to decouple expose_in_sqllab API filtering from sqlLabMode rendering, fixing the SQL Lab picker dialog to only show databases with expose_in_sqllab=true.

issue_title: chore: add pipeline verification marker file
summary: Added PIPELINE_TEST.md at repo root with exact content from issue #11; CI green, no other files modified.
